_comment: Pluggable catalog for the Game Center hub (apps/games). Add a game = drop a module under apps/games/www/games/<id>.js that calls defineGame(), then add an entry here. The hub reads this list to populate the catalog; no firmware change. minPlayers/maxPlayers/ai/realtime mirror the defineGame() contract so the lobby can show seats and AI options before the module is loaded.

games.name: Tris
games.desc: Filetto a turni, 2 giocatori o contro ANIMA.

games.name: Forza 4
games.desc: Allinea quattro gettoni. 2 giocatori o contro ANIMA (facile/medio).

games.name: Pong
games.desc: Il classico in tempo reale. 1v1 umani in rete, o contro ANIMA (offline o con cervello LLM Claude/Grok).
